results.query: Describe the B.Com.(H) course at MAC
results.ground_truth: B.Com.(H) is a flagship undergraduate commerce programme at MAC, University of Delhi
results.answer:
The B.Com.(H) course at MAC has 8 papers:

1. Sem-VII & VIII
2. Generic Elective B.Com (H)
3. Sem-I B.Com (H) and B.A. (Prog) Commerce Based Papers
4. Sem-II B.Com (H) and B.A. (Prog) Commerce Based Papers
5. Sem-III B.Com (H) and B.A. (Prog) Commerce Based Papers
6. Sem-IV, V and VI B.Com (H) and B.A. (Prog) Commerce Based Papers
